content.full_text:
September 15, 2005

Elaine A. Miles, Secretary
Sutter County Taxpayers Association
487 Anita Way
Yuba City, CA 95993

Re: Your Request for Reconsideration
Our File No. W-05-189

Dear Ms. Miles:

This letter is in response to your request for reconsideration of the advice provided to you on behalf of the Sutter County Taxpayers Association in Advice Letter No. A-05-162.

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of September 8, 2005, you have withdrawn your request for reconsideration of the advice.

If you have questions concerning this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Chief, Technical Assistance Division
